memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garrett Family in England.pdf
memoryArtifacts.description: This extensive research appears to have been completed by John E. Garrett Jr. who also provided the Garrett Family Genealogy attached in several of the same records. Everyone in this document is not yet tagged. Link - https://www.yumpu.com/en/document/read/20936828/the-garretts-in-england-garrett-family-genealogy

zh.Coventry, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾考文垂
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Nethermill於大約1508年出生在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂時，她的父親Julian Nethermill28歲，母親Dame Joan Middlemore28歲。她和Sir William Garrard至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1573年在英國享年66歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Coventry, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾考文垂
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Nethermill于大约1508年出生在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂时，她的父亲Julian Nethermill28岁，母亲Dame Joan Middlemore28岁。她和Sir William Garrard至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1573年在英国享年66岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Nethermill was born about 1508, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, her father, Julian Nethermill, was 28 and her mother, Dame Joan Middlemore, was 28. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Sir William Garrard. She died in 1573, in England, at the age of 66, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Nethermill est née environ 1508, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Julian Nethermill, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Dame Joan Middlemore, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Sir William Garrard. Elle est décédée en 1573, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Nethermill um 1508 in Coventry, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Julian Nethermill 28 und ihre Mutter Dame Joan Middlemore 28. Sie hatte mit Sir William Garrard mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1573 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Nethermill è nata il circa 1508 nel Coventry, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Julian Nethermill, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Dame Joan Middlemore, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Sir William Garrard. Morì nel 1573, nel England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Nethermillが約1508年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで生まれた時，父Julian Nethermillは28歳，母Dame Joan Middlemoreは28歳であった。彼女はSir William Garrardとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1573年にイギリスで66歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Nethermill(이)가 대략 1508년 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Julian Nethermill(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Joan Middlemore(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Garrard(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 영국에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Nethermill nasceu aproximadamente 1508, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Julian Nethermill, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dame Joan Middlemore, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir William Garrard. Ela faleceu em 1573, em Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Nethermill родилась около 1508 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Julian Nethermill было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Joan Middlemore, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sir William Garrard. Она умерла в 1573 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Nethermill nació aproximadamente 1508, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Julian Nethermill, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Dame Joan Middlemore, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir William Garrard. Murió en 1573, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
